title: Alpha Recipes
description: Returns all crafting/smelting recipes from minecraft alpha and disables new ones!
body:
# Alpha Recipes
### A datapack/mod by Wilozyx

Alpha recipes is an adjacent project to [beta recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/beta-recipes) - this project focuses on faithfully bringing back all recipes from around alpha 1.1.2_01

All recipes are returned 1:1 to how they were, and new, modern, recipes are disabled, making crafting and smelting equal to alpha's

**Some of the more noteworthy changes from alpha minecraft's recipes:**
- all newer recipes disabled!
- only oak logs can be used for planks
- no experience from smelting
- the only craftable slab is the smooth stone slab, which is craftable with cobblestone
- smooth stone slab recipe outputs 3 slabs instead of 6
- stone buttons are crafted with 2 vertical stone blocks
- ladders recipe outputs 1 instead of 3
- fences are made with 6 sticks and output 2 instead of 3
- golden apples are crafted with gold blocks instead of ingots
- sign recipe outputs 1 instead of 3
- wood door recipe outputs 1 instead of 3
- books are crafted with 3 paper vertically
- flint and steel, mushroom stews, chest minecarts and furnace minecarts are shaped recipes
- pressure plates require 3 stone/plank blocks instead of 2

## NOTE

Alpha Recipes and all of my other works are completely *public property*, meaning everyone is 100% free to put this into their own modpacks/put this into their own datapacks/edit/tweak/share/etc!
